prompt: What do you think about minimalist warm-ups (mostly just barbell warm-up sets) instead of long activation/mobility routines?
assertions: States minimalist warm-ups are fine IF they reliably prepare you for the session
Frames it as a cost-benefit issue (especially for time-limited lifters)
Warns against under-warming if needed mobility/positioning work is removed
Recommends iterative troubleshooting: remove one element at a time, keep only what helps
Concludes the best warm-up is the minimum effective warm-up for your body and session
